label: Member Login
expected_behavior: Switches to the email/password member-login view (showView('member')); deactivates the other two tabs.

label: Access Code
expected_behavior: Switches to the access-code view and focuses #codeInput after 50ms.

label: Try Demo
expected_behavior: Switches to the read-only demo-login view.

label: Email (you@email.com)
expected_behavior: Email field; trimmed value read by doLogin() and pre-filled into the reset-email field when 'Forgot password?' opens.

label: Password
expected_behavior: Password field; value passed to signInWithEmailAndPassword in doLogin(); refocused on auth error.

label: Show/hide password (eye)
expected_behavior: Toggles #passwordInput type between password/text and swaps the icon between eye and monkey emoji.

label: Remember me
expected_behavior: When checked, doLogin sets browserLocalPersistence (else browserSessionPersistence) before sign-in.

label: Forgot password?
expected_behavior: Hides main view, shows reset view, copies email into #resetEmail and focuses it.

label: Sign In (form submit)
expected_behavior: doLogin(): validates email+pass present, sets persistence, signInWithEmailAndPassword, stores PasswordCredential, redirects to /pro/dashboard.html; shows friendlyError on failure.
notes: Starts disabled in HTML; JS removes disabled after wiring (line 96).

label: Reset email (you@email.com)
expected_behavior: Email field inside the reset view; value passed to sendPasswordResetEmail in doReset().

label: Send reset link (form submit)
expected_behavior: doReset(): validates email present, calls sendPasswordResetEmail(auth,email), shows success banner or friendlyError.
notes: Sends a real password-reset email — drive only to confirm boundary.

label: ← Back to sign in
expected_behavior: Hides reset view, restores main view, clears reset error/success banners.

label: Access code (NBD-————)
expected_behavior: Uppercases + strips non [A-Z0-9-] on input; Enter key triggers doCodeLogin(); value sent to validateAccessCode.

label: Sign in with code
expected_behavior: doCodeLogin(): calls validateAccessCode({code}); on success exchanges customToken via signInWithCustomToken and redirects to dashboard (legacy email/password shim fallback).
notes: Access-code login was prod-broken pending serviceAccountTokenCreator IAM grant (memory: access-code-login-iam-gap).

label: Enter Demo
expected_behavior: doDemoLogin(): calls validateAccessCode({code:'DEMO'}), signs in via customToken, redirects to dashboard (read-only demo session).
notes: Demo code re-activated via scripts/seed-demo-access.js; same IAM dependency as access code.

label: ← Back to Pro overview
expected_behavior: Navigates to /pro/ landing.

label: View plans → / See membership plans
expected_behavior: Navigates to the pricing section of the Pro landing page.
notes: Representative of several plan/contact links (tel:8594207382, mailto Joe) in the auth chrome.

label: Continue with Google
expected_behavior: googleRegister(): signInWithPopup(GoogleAuthProvider), creates users/{uid} doc if absent, optionally validates access code, then redirects to dashboard after 1.2s.

label: Access code (NBD-XXXXX or leave blank)
expected_behavior: Uppercases on input; blank = free account path, present = validated via validateAccessCode after account creation.
notes: Hint suggests code NBD-PRO.

label: First name (Joe)
expected_behavior: Required first-name field; trimmed and written to users/{uid}.firstName + displayName.

label: Last name (Deal)
expected_behavior: Optional last-name field; trimmed and written to users/{uid}.lastName + displayName.

label: Company name
expected_behavior: Optional company field; trimmed and written to users/{uid}.company.

label: Email (you@yourcompany.com)
expected_behavior: Required email; passed to createUserWithEmailAndPassword and stored on the user doc.

label: Password (8+ characters)
expected_behavior: Required password (min 8 chars, validated); drives the live strength meter (updateStrength) on input.

label: Confirm password (Repeat password)
expected_behavior: Confirm-password field; must equal #regPass or register() errors 'Passwords do not match.'

label: Show password (eye, password field)
expected_behavior: togglePass('regPass'): toggles the password field's visibility via the data-target binding.
notes: Repeats for #regConfirm at register.html:554 (data-target='regConfirm').

label: Create Account →
expected_behavior: register(): validates fields, createUserWithEmailAndPassword, sets displayName, sendEmailVerification, writes users/{uid}; if code given validates it and exchanges customToken; redirects to dashboard.
notes: Creates a real Firebase user + sends verification email; drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Sign in → / Already have an account?
expected_behavior: Navigates to /pro/login.html.
notes: mailto:jd@nobigdealwithjoedeal.com contact links also present (478-479,515).

label: Today / 7 Days / 30 Days / All Time
expected_behavior: window.setRange(range, btn): changes the analytics time window and re-renders the dashboard; activates the clicked range button.
notes: Represents 4 range buttons (data-range today/7d/30d/all). Page is behind pro-analytics-gate.js auth/plan gate.

label: ↻ Refresh
expected_behavior: window.loadData(): re-fetches and re-renders the analytics data for the current range.

label: CRM / Daily / AI Tree / Codex / Understand / Project / Analytics / Account
expected_behavior: Top-nav links navigating to the respective standalone pro pages (dashboard, daily-success, ai-tree, codex, understand, project-codex, analytics, login).
notes: Representative of 8 nav links + tb-brand logo link (146). Duplicates SPA nav surfaces.

label: Today / This Week / This Month / All Time
expected_behavior: Sets currentPeriod to the clicked data-period and calls renderAll(); activates the clicked period button.
notes: Represents 4 period buttons (day/week/month/all; 'all' default active).

label: 🚪 Doors Knocked / 🏆 Deals Closed / 💰 Revenue
expected_behavior: Sets currentTab to the clicked data-tab and calls renderAll(); activates the clicked tab.
notes: Represents 3 metric tabs (doors/deals/revenue; 'doors' default active).

label: Log In
expected_behavior: Shown in the signed-out gate; navigates to /pro/login.html.
notes: Revealed only when onAuthStateChanged has no user. nav-back link (144) navigates to dashboard.

label: Ask me anything... (chat textarea)
expected_behavior: Auto-grows on input; Enter (without Shift) triggers sendMessage(); value is the AI prompt.
notes: Page behind ask-joe-gate.js auth gate.

label: ➤ Send
expected_behavior: sendMessage(): posts the trimmed userInput to the Claude proxy, disables itself while streaming, renders the AI reply, re-enables and refocuses the input.
notes: Calls Claude proxy (claude-proxy.js) — consumes AI quota; not destructive.

label: ← Back to Dashboard
expected_behavior: Navigates back to /pro/dashboard.html.

label: First name *
expected_behavior: Required referral first-name; blank value blocks submit with 'First name is required.'
reveal_state: after:valid ?ref= param (form shown only when ref present)
notes: Whole #referForm is display:none until a ?ref= query param exists; else #emptyState shows.

label: Last name
expected_behavior: Optional referral last-name; trimmed into the public-lead payload.

label: Phone *
expected_behavior: tel input; phone OR email required (digits stripped); validated before submit.

label: Email
expected_behavior: Optional email; satisfies the 'phone or email required' rule when phone is blank.

label: Address (optional)
expected_behavior: Optional street-address; trimmed into the referral lead payload.

label: Anything we should know? (optional)
expected_behavior: Optional 600-char notes textarea; trimmed into the referral lead payload.

label: Send my info (form submit)
expected_behavior: Validates first name + (phone|email), then POSTs the referral lead to the Cloud Functions base (us-central1-nobigdeal-pro); shows status + done state.
notes: Submits a real public referral lead to prod Cloud Function — drive only to confirm boundary.

label: Start Free — 14 Day Pro Trial →
expected_behavior: Navigates to /pro/register.html (free trial signup).
notes: Static teaser page; appears twice (top + bottom CTA).

label: Go Pro — $79/mo
expected_behavior: Navigates to /pro/register.html?plan=pro (paid plan signup).
notes: $79/mo conflicts with canonical pricing (Solo $99) per memory terms-page-pricing-conflict — flag content, not a functional bug.

label: Sign Up to Access →
expected_behavior: Navigates to /pro/register.html from each feature teaser card.
notes: Repeats 6x (one per feature card). All point to register.html.

label: Pro Home / Login / Pricing / Main Site
expected_behavior: Header + footer chrome links: /pro/, /pro/login.html, /pro/landing.html#pricing, / .
notes: Inline <script> at 667 is scroll-reveal IntersectionObserver only — no interactive controls.

label: ▶ Restart Tour
expected_behavior: Removes localStorage 'nbd-onboarding-complete' then navigates to dashboard.html so the onboarding tour auto-fires.

label: Search how-tos (search box)
expected_behavior: runSearch on input: client-side filters/ highlights how-to sections; '/' key focuses it, Escape clears+blurs; ?q= param pre-runs a search.

label: × Clear search
expected_behavior: Clears #searchInput value and refocuses it (hides itself when query empty).
notes: Gets .show class only when search has text.

label: Contents
expected_behavior: Toggles the .collapsed class on #toc (collapse/expand the sticky table-of-contents).

label: TOC section links (Getting started, Kanban, Estimates, …)
expected_behavior: Anchor-scrolls to the matching .section[id]; the scroll handler highlights the active TOC link.
notes: Represents ~20 in-page anchor links across 5 TOC groups; plus in-body cross-reference anchors (e.g. #documents).

label: ← Dashboard / Open CRM
expected_behavior: Navigates back to dashboard.html.
